[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustration shows two black-and-gray clothed figures on a light background with large bright green scribble-like lines and loops drawn over them.

Main Subject:
The image centers on two partially overlapping, pixelated-style human figures. One figure stands on the left wearing dark clothing, with a visible face area and raised hand near the center of the composition. The other figure is positioned on the right, bent forward toward the middle, with its upper body and head angled downward, and its arm extending toward the center where the green lines cluster most heavily.

Setting:
The background is a plain light gray or off-white. The ground area is darker at the bottom edge, giving a minimal, flat stage-like look. Lighting appears even and neutral with no clear outdoor weather or time of day.

Visual Details:
The left figure wears a dark top and dark pants, with shoes visible at the bottom. The right figure wears dark clothing with a light patch on the upper garment near the chest and dark pants and shoes. Both figures appear rendered in a low-detail, pixelated style. Bright neon-green lines overlay the scene, forming looping arcs, crossing strokes, and tangled curves that cover much of the center and right portions of the image, with thicker continuous strokes and overlapping intersections. The camera angle appears straight-on or slightly angled, and the composition is vertically framed with the main action occurring in the middle.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows two dark-clothed, stylized figures standing close together with their bodies oriented toward the center. Bright green scribble-like lines swirl across the scene, obscuring parts of both figures.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
